data.title: Pieverse (PIEVERSE) will soon be available on the Bybit spot trading platform.
data.description: According to the official announcement, Bybit will list Pieverse (PIEVERSE) on the spot market on November 14th. Deposits will be open at 3:00 AM (UTC) on November 14th. Trading will begin at 1:00 PM (UTC) on November 14th. Withdrawals will begin at 10:00 AM (UTC) on November 15th. Pieverse is a compliant payment infrastructure for agent-natives. Its core mission is to build a Web3-based payment network that enables verifiable value recording by providing on-chain timestamping authentication for invoices, receipts, and checks.

data.title: The "ETH shorting whale" that previously borrowed cryptocurrency added another 16,937 ETH to its holdings, bringing its total holdings to 422,175 ETH.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, the address that previously borrowed to short ETH has just bought another 16,937 ETH, worth approximately $53.91 million. This address has now bought a total of 422,175 ETH, with a total transaction value of approximately $1.34 billion.

data.title: Physicists Discover “Quantum Mirrors” That Trap Light in 2D Materials
data.description:
Chip-scale terahertz spectroscopy revealed that 2D materials naturally trap light in “quantum mirrors,” opening new ways to study and manipulate exotic quantum behaviors.
source: https://catenaa.com/industries/technology/physicists-discover-quantum-mirrors-that-trap-light-in-2d-materials/

data.title: Bitcoin Crashes To $98,000 As HODLer Selling Accelerates
data.description:
On-chain data shows Bitcoin long-term holders have been ramping up their selling recently, a potential reason behind BTC’s fall under $100,000. Bitcoin Long-Term Holders Have Been Booking Profits In a new post on X, on-chain analytics firm Glassnode has discussed about the latest trend in the supply of the Bitcoin long-term holders (LTHs). These are referred to as the investors holding their coins for a period longer than 155 days, without selling or involving them in a transaction on the blockchain. Related Reading: Bitcoin Sentiment Most Fearful Since March: Is A Bottom Near? Statistically, the longer an investor holds onto their coins, the less likely they become to sell them in the future
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/bitcoin-news/bitcoin-selling-accelerates-btc-holds-100000/

data.title: Orama Labs launches a $5 million ecosystem fund; Kingnet AI and ZENO receive the first batch of grants.
data.description: Orama Labs, a DeSci & AI asset protocol, announced the establishment of a $5 million ecosystem fund to support the development of cutting-edge technology projects. The first batch of grants has been officially distributed, with Kingnet AI receiving $1 million in $PYTHIA tokens and spatial intelligence project ZENO receiving $200,000 in $PYTHIA tokens. Notably, the ZENO project is driving the transition of "spatial intelligence" from theory to practice, and its mirror world platform echoes the industry prediction made by Stanford AI guru Fei-Fei Li that "the next big thing in AI is spatial intelligence." Kingnet AI, as an AI-driven game creation engine, significantly reduces game development costs through natural language processing technology; this award will deepen the cooperation between the two parties at the technology and ecosystem levels. The Orama ecosystem fund will continue to select projects with innovative technologies and clear business models, providing funding, resources, and full-chain support, with a focus on cutting-edge fields such as DeSci, AI, and DEPIN. [Source Link]

data.title: BTX Capital accused of manipulating the prices of multiple Hyperliquid tokens
data.description: Crypto analyst Specter published an article on X stating that on-chain investigations indicate BTX Capital and its founder Vanessa Cao are suspected of price manipulation of multiple tokens on Hyperliquid. Specter claims the operations involve tokens such as POPCAT and TST, and appear to have exploited their large financial resources for profit. On November 12th, the attackers placed approximately $25 million in buy orders at around $0.21 for POPCAT, creating a false impression of strong demand through more than 26 wallets before cancelling the orders, leading to massive liquidations. The attackers lost approximately $4 million in collateral, and HLP lost approximately $4.9 million. He believes the attackers' ability to withstand such large losses may be related to their shorting of the token on centralized platforms. Specter indicates that on-chain fund flows further point to BTX Capital. Wallets involved in TST manipulation, Bybit deposit wallets, and multi-signature addresses are all directly linked to BTX Capital's official wallet and VanessaCao's public wallet vanessacao.eth, demonstrating its ability to mobilize large sums of money for price manipulation. Furthermore, Specter points out that BTX Capital may have also manipulated tokens such as ZEREBRO, JELLYJELLY, and HIFI, which have recently experienced abnormal price fluctuations, and suspects similar methods may be applied to ZEC.

data.title: CryptoQuant: Long-term Bitcoin holders have sold approximately 815,000 BTC in the past 30 days.
data.description: CryptoQuant reported that long-term Bitcoin holders have significantly reduced their positions recently. The firm stated that long-term holders sold approximately 815,000 Bitcoins in the past 30 days, the highest level since January 2024. Against a backdrop of weakening demand, this sustained selling pressure is having a downward impact on prices.

data.title: A suspected Bitmine-related address received 9176 ETH 3 hours ago.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, a new address, 0x9973, suspected to be associated with Bitmine, received 9,176 ETH, worth approximately $29.14 million, from Galaxy Digital's OTC wallet during the market downturn.

data.title: Trader Eugene: I have no intention of buying the dip after BTC fell below $100,000; I will wait for the $90,000 range.
data.description: Trader Eugene wrote that BTC's drop below $100,000 is significant for two reasons: first, the last support level of the high-cycle bullish structure was breached, with the 50-week trendline being lost for the first time since 2022; second, the $100,000 level, a strong psychological barrier, has transformed from support into resistance. He emphasized that against this backdrop, he has "no intention of buying the dip" and considers the $90,000 area as the next focus, with capital protection being the primary strategy at present.

data.title: XRP ETF Fails to Bump Bulls as Ripple-Linked Token Plunges 7.3% Amid BTC Selloff
data.description:
The much-anticipated XRP exchange-traded fund (ETF) has failed to provide the expected boost to bullish investors, as Ripple-linked tokens experienced a significant decline of 7.3%. This drop comes in the wake of a broader selloff in Bitcoin, which has negatively impacted the overall cryptocurrency market and contributed to the downward trend of XRP's value. Despite hopes that the ETF would attract new capital and drive prices higher, market conditions have proven challenging for XRP and its investors.
source: https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2025/11/14/xrp-etf-fails-to-bump-bulls-as-ripple-linked-token-plunges-7-3-amid-btc-selloff

data.title: Czech National Bank Dips Into Bitcoin — A Small $1M Test Portfolio With Big Implications
data.description:
The Czech National Bank has taken a significant step by investing in Bitcoin, allocating a modest sum of $1 million to create a test portfolio. This initiative, although relatively small in the context of the bank's overall financial strategy, carries substantial implications for the future of cryptocurrency in the country's financial landscape and could influence the approach of other central banks toward digital currencies. By exploring the potential of Bitcoin, the Czech National Bank is not only testing the waters of this volatile market but also signaling a progressive attitude towards integrating new financial technologies and assets into its operations.
source: https://blocknews.com/czech-national-bank-dips-into-bitcoin-a-small-1m-test-portfolio-with-big-implications/
